mapping_metadata.analyzer: Senior Test Automation Mapping Specialist Agent

test_case_mappings.test_case_description: Test case to verify the Billing Cycle Period card display and behavior on Print and Payment History page when a subscription plan is paused, including verification of complimentary pages progress bar, additional pages tracking, tooltips, and page usage information display across different printing scenarios.

precondition_mapping.precondition_text: Enroll the Ink printer with 50 pages plan or higher.
precondition_mapping.notes: This precondition requires printer enrollment methods or API helpers. Batch 15 contains shipment_tracking_page (for tracking shipments), shipping_billing_page (for managing addresses/payment), sign_in_page, thank_you_page, and tos_hp_smart_page. None of these files contain printer enrollment functionality. Printer enrollment methods likely exist in different batches containing printer setup or enrollment page objects.

precondition_mapping.precondition_text: Make sure the Subscription has no free months info.
precondition_mapping.notes: This precondition requires subscription state verification methods or API helpers. None of the page objects in batch 15 deal with subscription state management. Subscription verification methods likely exist in different batches containing subscription management or API helper modules.

precondition_mapping.precondition_text: Make sure the subscription is "subscribed" status.
precondition_mapping.notes: This precondition requires subscription status verification. None of the page objects in batch 15 contain subscription status checking functionality. Such methods likely exist in different batches containing subscription management page objects or API helpers.

precondition_mapping.precondition_text: Click the Pause Plan button on CIT modal or "Pause Instant Ink" link to trigger the pause plan.
precondition_mapping.notes: This precondition requires pause plan trigger methods. None of the page objects in batch 15 contain pause plan functionality. The batch contains shipment tracking, shipping/billing management, sign-in, confirmation, and terms of service pages - none related to pausing subscription plans. Pause plan methods likely exist in different batches containing subscription management or dashboard page objects.

test_case_mappings.no_match_reason:
Test case C44873414 is about verifying the Billing Cycle Period card on the Print and Payment History page for HP Instant Ink pause plan functionality. The test requires navigation to a Print and Payment History page, interaction with billing cycle period cards, verification of complimentary pages and additional pages progress bars, tooltip interactions, page usage tracking, and visual/responsive testing.

Batch 15 contains 5 page objects:

1. ShipmentTrackingPage (shipment_tracking_page.py) - This page is for tracking ink cartridge and paper shipments. It contains locators for cartridge tracking cards (K, C, M, Y, CMY), shipment history table, FAQ sections, and support links. While it is related to HP Instant Ink shipments, it is NOT the Print and Payment History page. Shipment tracking shows delivery status of cartridges, while the test case requires billing cycle period information and page usage tracking. These are completely different pages with different purposes.

2. ShippingBillingPage (shipping_billing_page.py) - This page is for managing shipping addresses and payment methods. It contains forms for entering/editing shipping addresses and adding/editing credit card payment information. While it deals with billing in the sense of payment methods, it is NOT related to billing cycle period cards or page usage tracking. This is a management/settings page for addresses and payment, not a history/tracking page for billing cycles and print usage.

3. SignInPage (sign_in_page.py) - This is the authentication page with email and password inputs. Completely unrelated to billing cycle functionality.

4. ThankYouPage (thank_you_page.py) - This is a confirmation page shown after completing workflows. Completely unrelated to billing cycle functionality.

5. TermsOfServiceHPSmartPage (tos_hp_smart_page.py) - This is a terms of service consent page. Completely unrelated to billing cycle functionality.

The test case requires:
- PrintAndPaymentHistoryPage with billing cycle period card elements
- Progress bar elements for complimentary pages and additional pages
- Tooltip elements and hover/click interactions
- Page usage tracking display elements
- Time manipulation and print simulation API helpers
- Visual testing and responsive testing utilities

None of these components exist in batch 15. The required page objects and components likely exist in different batches containing:
- Print and payment history page objects
- HP Instant Ink dashboard page objects
- Subscription management page objects
- API helper modules for time manipulation and print simulation
- Test utility modules for visual and responsive testing

Conclusion: Batch 15 contains page objects for shipment tracking, shipping/billing management forms, authentication, confirmation, and terms of service - none of which are relevant to the billing cycle period card functionality being tested in C44873414.
